# ITLibMediaItemPlayStatus.none

**Case**

The user has played the media item or iTunes doesn’t track the play status for this kind of media item.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Related Documentation

- **playCount**: The number of times the user has played the media item.

## Media Item Play Statuses

- **ITLibMediaItemPlayStatus.partiallyPlayed**: The user has partially played the media item.
- **ITLibMediaItemPlayStatus.unplayed**: The user hasn’t played the media item.

items.description: The number of times the user has played the media item.
